---
title: "Rmarkdown_16S_Ananlysis"
author: "Simon Vandersanden"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---

## Inspecting the Phyloseq Object

The phyloseq object contains count data, taxonomy, and sample metadata.

```{r}
library(phyloseq)

Phylo_Object <- readRDS("data/ps_IdTax_noncontam_NoMito_No_Chloro.rds")

otu_table_data <- as(otu_table(Phylo_Object), "matrix")
head(otu_table_data[,1:5])

````



```{r}


```
